title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Divi's Laboratories

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Divi's Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Divi's Laboratories in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Divi's Laboratories:
Divi's Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Divi's Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
